name: Banana Pudding Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 large ripe bananas, cut into 1/2 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Spritz and flour a 1-quart (6-cup) bundt pan.
3. In a bowl, mix dry ingredients: whole wheat pastry flour, unbleached flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
4. Add bananas to the dry ingredients and stir until evenly coated on both sides.
5. Combine apple juice, maple syrup, and vanilla extract in a separate bowl.
6. Pour the liquid mixture into the flour mixture and stir until well combined.
7. Place the batter into the prepared bundt pan and cover tightly with foil.
8. Place the pan in a pressure cooker and bring 3 cups of water to a boil.
9. Carefully lower the bundt pan into the boiling water, ensuring it is fully covered.
10. Lock the lid and immediately raise the pan to high pressure.
11. Cook for 35 minutes under high pressure.
12. Release the pressure using the quick-release valve and carefully remove the bundt pan.
13. Place the cooled bundt cake on a wire rack.
14. Unmold the cake and serve.
